Not exact location. Pecans and burr oaks throughout this neighborhood along road/sidewalks. Most of the pecans are smaller with thicker shells, but tasty. 2015 has been a good producing year in San Marcos and Marble Falls. Access: Private but overhanging. Fall
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Pecan Tree in the dog park and along the parking lot in front of the park!
